name: White Chocolate Cake Bswn00a
recipeIngredient: 1/4 lb Dipping chocolate or real white chocolate
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all cake ingredients in a large bowl, adding baking powder and flour last.
2. Do not over-beat after adding flour and buttermilk.
3. Pour batter into two 9-inch round cake pans or one 9x12-inch rectangular pan.
4. Bake at 350°F for 35-40 minutes.
5. Icing: Cream together 1 stick margarine, 1 pound powdered sugar, 1 t vanilla extract, and 8 oz cream cheese with heavy cream or half-and-half until smooth.
Source: magazine, newsletter Oct '89 Dolores McCann
